name: Alternate KiCad- ibrary
description: Symbol and Footprint library focused on improving schematic and PCB readability and aesthetics, mainly intended for hobbyist use
description_full:
Current version: 4.0

Check your settings in preferences -> packages and updates.
If you have the default library nickname prefix 'PCM_', proceed to install version 4.0.
If you don't want that prefix, leave that field blank and choose version 4.0n from the list below.
Refer to documentation via the links below if you have any trouble

Alternate KiCad Library contains over 36700 symbols and 10400 footprints.
 Version 4.0 adds LED, Voltage regulator and crystal symbol libraries, LED footprint libraries and various improvements and bugfixes to existing symbols and footprints.
